cit.basis: 35% corporate income tax (impuesto sobre la renta), Estatuto Tributario Art. 240.
cit.financial_institution_note: Financial institutions pay a +5pp surtax (sobretasa) through 2027, for a combined 40% rate.

minimum_effective_tax.note: Pillar-Two-style domestic minimum effective tax rate (Tasa de Tributación Depurada, TTD) of 15%; not modelled in this estimator.

cit.note: Administered by the DIAN (Dirección de Impuestos y Aduanas Nacionales).

vat.note: IVA (Impuesto sobre las Ventas) at a 19% standard rate.

ica.note: ICA (Impuesto de Industria y Comercio) is a municipal turnover tax on gross receipts; rates vary by municipality and activity (typically 0.2%-1.4%). Not modelled in this estimator.

official_sources.name: DIAN (Dirección de Impuestos y Aduanas Nacionales)

effective_date_range.basis: Target ruleset/params year; jurisdiction fiscal calendars and transitional periods may differ.

rate_threshold_assumptions: Rates and thresholds are simplified for LedgerField estimates.
Minimum effective tax (TTD), ICA, presumptive rules, and sector-specific regimes may alter outcomes.
Verify against official DIAN guidance and local advisor before filing or production use.
limitations: Not legal, tax, accounting, or filing advice.
Does not encode every deduction, exemption, treaty, WHT, payroll, or filing rule.
High-stakes use requires local validation against official forms and current law.
